title: centaurea marmorea
intro: Centaurea marmorea, also known as marble cornflower, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is rich in health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as a natural antihistamine. Centaurea marmorea is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and can be consumed raw or in supplement form, but its use should be guided by a healthcare professional.
